name: Swiss Tuna Quiche
recipeIngredient: 13 oz. Chicken of the Sea, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce the pastry thoroughly with a fork.
2. Bake in a 375°F oven for 10 minutes, then remove and allow to cool.
3. In a large bowl, toss together the tuna, Swiss cheese, mayonnaise, milk, Worcestershire sauce, and ground nutmeg, mixing well.
4. (Optional) Add half a can of cream of celery soup as part of the cheese measure.)
5. Bake for 40-50 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Serves 8. Perfect dish for the beach or sending to a covered-dish dinner. Delicious also without the pastry shell. May also vary the meats using 1 cup of either minced ham, chicken pieces, or turkey pieces.
